---
title: "Deep Learning Theory: Mathematical Foundations for Scientific Machine Learning"
subtitle: "Track D — Scientific ML"
date: "2025-01-01"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
number-sections: true
---

# Deep Learning Theory: Mathematical Foundations for Scientific Machine Learning

**Track**: Track D — Scientific ML

The mathematical theory underlying deep learning: approximation theory, optimization landscape, generalization, and architecture design. Provides the theoretical foundation for all SciML methods.

## Table of Contents

1. Universal Approximation Theory
2. Neural Network Architectures as Mathematical Objects
3. Optimization Landscape of Neural Networks
4. Generalization Theory
5. Automatic Differentiation: Theory and Implementation
6. Regularization and Inductive Bias
7. Equivariant and Geometric Deep Learning
8. Generative Models: Mathematical Foundations

---

## Chapter 1: Universal Approximation Theory

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 2: Neural Network Architectures as Mathematical Objects

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 3: Optimization Landscape of Neural Networks

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 4: Generalization Theory

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 5: Automatic Differentiation: Theory and Implementation

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 6: Regularization and Inductive Bias

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 7: Equivariant and Geometric Deep Learning

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 8: Generative Models: Mathematical Foundations

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*
